wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit. The system correctly avoided placing the TATASTEEL order (42% AI probability, zone score 48 below threshold), but the existing WIPRO BUY position from a prior day remains open and counter-trend.
losses_analysis: No stop losses were hit today, but the WIPRO BUY position is a counter-trend trade in a strong downtrend regime (ADX=25, Nifty -1.4%). This position should not have been entered in the first place given the trending_down regime. The system's pre-trade filter correctly identified both setups as unsuitable today but failed to close the legacy WIPRO position.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime with ADX=25 and Nifty falling 1.4% made BUY setups extremely dangerous. The system's decision to place zero new orders was correct. However, holding an existing counter-trend BUY (WIPRO) hurt by exposing capital to adverse trend pressure. SELL-aligned strategies would have been ideal if zone scores and AI probabilities were higher.

improvements.action: Implement forced exit rule: close any open BUY position when regime is trending_down AND ADX >= 25 AND daily Nifty move is worse than -1%. Exit WIPRO BUY at market open tomorrow if regime persists.
improvements.reason: WIPRO BUY is counter-trend in a confirmed downtrend. Holding it contradicts the regime filter that correctly blocked new BUY entries today. Legacy positions must also respect regime changes.

improvements.action: Raise minimum AI probability threshold to 55% for SELL setups in trending_down regime (currently effectively 50%). TATASTEEL at 42% was correctly skipped but the bar needs to be explicit.
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL SELL had only 42% AI confidence and zone score of 48. Even trend-aligned trades need conviction. Codify the 55% floor to avoid ambiguity.

improvements.action: Set minimum zone score to 55 (not 50) for any trade entry when only 1-2 setups are found across all 50 stocks. Low setup count signals poor opportunity — raise quality bar.
improvements.reason: Only 2 setups found today across Nifty 50, both below quality thresholds. When opportunities are scarce, the temptation to lower standards increases. A higher zone score floor prevents marginal entries.

improvements.action: Add a 'no new BUY orders' hard block when regime=trending_down AND ADX>=22. This was noted yesterday but WIPRO BUY at 0% AI probability still appeared in recommendations — remove it from the list entirely.
improvements.reason: WIPRO BUY showed 0% AI probability yet still appeared as rank 2 recommendation. Even without order placement, listing it wastes attention and risks manual override errors.

improvements.action: If TATASTEEL 191 supply zone is retested tomorrow with fresh candle confirmation (bearish engulfing or strong red close near 191), consider SELL entry only if AI probability rises above 55% and zone score improves above 55.
improvements.reason: The 191 zone was identified but not triggered today. A genuine retest with momentum confirmation tomorrow could provide a higher-probability trend-aligned entry.

tomorrow_focus: Exit WIPRO BUY at open if downtrend persists, then wait for high-conviction SELL setups (AI>55%, zone>55) aligned with the trending_down regime — do not force trades if quality is absent.

symbol_notes.WIPRO: Counter-trend BUY in confirmed downtrend. Exit at market open tomorrow unless overnight gap reverses trend. 0% AI probability confirms this was never a valid setup.
symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Supply zone at 191 is valid but needs AI probability above 55% and fresh bearish confirmation on retest. Watch for gap-down open that bypasses the zone entirely, which would invalidate the setup.
